overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage depicting a drive through Night City, transitioning from a covered concrete overpass with green industrial lighting into a dense neon-lit urban district featuring tall skyscrapers, Asian signage, and wet reflective streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway underpass with concrete infrastructure

agents.ego_description: driving steadily forward through the covered overpass beneath concrete infrastructure

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass forming a roof over the road with exposed beams and pipes
greenish fluorescent tube lights mounted on the ceiling of the overpass
yellow-topped metal guardrail running along the right side of the road
double yellow lines and painted symbols on the asphalt road surface
thick concrete pillars supporting the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a drive through a covered concrete highway underpass illuminated by greenish fluorescent lights. The road is marked with yellow lines and bordered by metal guardrails, with massive support pillars visible on the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway underpass opening to industrial district views

events.description: the right side of the overpass opens up revealing the industrial city skyline with smokestacks and towers
a dark colored van overtakes on the left side and passes ahead

agents.ego_description: maintaining speed while driving forward as the enclosed overpass opens to reveal city views on the right

notable_agents.action: dark van overtaking on the left and moving ahead into the distance

entered.detail: futuristic industrial buildings with smokestacks and towers visible through the opening in the overpass

segments.scene_description: Continuing under the overpass, the right side opens to reveal a distant industrial city skyline with smokestacks against the night sky. A dark van overtakes on the left while the road remains covered overhead by concrete infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street intersection transitioning from underpass to open city

events.description: exiting the covered overpass completely into the open urban environment
passing the green street sign labeled 'Sutter' mounted on the right side

agents.ego_description: navigating through light traffic while transitioning from the covered overpass to the open street

notable_agents.action: black van driving ahead and signaling to turn left at the intersection

entered.detail: green rectangular street sign with white text reading 'Sutter' and a pink stripe
commercial buildings with cyan and red neon lighting visible ahead on the left
zebra crossing markings painted on the road surface ahead

segments.scene_description: The vehicle exits the covered overpass into an open urban intersection. A green 'Sutter' street sign appears on the right, while neon-lit commercial buildings become visible ahead. The scene transitions from enclosed concrete infrastructure to an exposed city street with crosswalk markings.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense cyberpunk commercial district with high-rise neon signage

events.description: ambient lighting shifts dramatically to vibrant neon colors from surrounding buildings and signs
approaching a busy intersection with pedestrians crossing and multiple vehicles waiting

agents.ego_description: driving through the vibrant neon-lit district, navigating around pedestrians and other vehicles at intersections

notable_agents.action: pedestrian crossing the street at the illuminated crosswalk

entered.detail: tall cylindrical skyscrapers with glass facades covered in cyan and red neon lights
large red neon signs with Asian characters spanning across the street between buildings
ground floor commercial spaces with illuminated signage and decorative lighting along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a dense cyberpunk commercial district dominated by tall glass skyscrapers covered in vibrant cyan and red neon lights. Large Asian neon signs span across the street while pedestrians cross at illuminated crosswalks. The atmosphere is distinctly urban and futuristic with wet streets reflecting the neon glow.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive that transitions from a claustrophobic industrial underpass into a vibrant, neon-drenched urban center. It begins beneath a covered concrete highway illuminated by greenish fluorescent lights, passing massive support pillars and metal guardrails. As the vehicle continues forward, the right side opens to reveal a distant skyline of industrial smokestacks just as a dark van overtakes on the left. The scene then shifts as the camera exits the concrete infrastructure into an open intersection, passing a green street sign before the enclosed tunnel gives way to an exposed city street. Finally, the environment expands into a dense commercial district where towering glass skyscrapers and large Asian neon signs cast cyan and red reflections across wet pavement and illuminated crosswalks.
